Module ProjetGenieLogiciel
Package fr.projet.model

Class Edge

java.lang.Object
fr.projet.model.Edge
public class Edge extends Object
Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph. Each edge has a distance and may contain agents traveling through it.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Edge(Node source, Node destination, double distance)
    Creates a new edge between two nodes.

  • Constructor Details

    • Edge

      public Edge(Node source, Node destination, double distance)
      Creates a new edge between two nodes. The edge is undirected by default, with unlimited capacity and no agents.
      Parameters:
      source - starting node
      destination - ending node
      distance - cost or distance of the edge

  • Method Details

    • getSource

      public Node getSource()
      Returns the source node of the edge.
      Returns:
      source node

    • setSource

      public void setSource(Node source)
      Sets the source node of the edge.
      Parameters:
      source - new source node

    • getDestination

      public Node getDestination()
      Returns the destination node of the edge.
      Returns:
      destination node

    • setDestination

      public void setDestination(Node destination)
      Sets the destination node of the edge.
      Parameters:
      destination - new destination node

    • getDistance

      public double getDistance()
      Returns the distance of the edge.
      Returns:
      edge distance

    • setDistance

      public void setDistance(double distance)
      Sets the distance of the edge.
      Parameters:
      distance - new distance value

    • isOriented

      public boolean isOriented()
      Returns whether the edge is directed.
      Returns:
      true if the edge is oriented

    • setOriented

      public void setOriented(boolean oriented)
      Sets whether the edge is directed.
      Parameters:
      oriented - true if the edge should be oriented

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns the maximum capacity of the edge.
      Returns:
      maximum number of agents allowed

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int capacity)
      Sets the maximum capacity of the edge.
      Parameters:
      capacity - new capacity value

    • getAgents

      public List<Agent> getAgents()
      Returns the list of agents currently on this edge.
      Returns:
      list of agents

    • setAgents

      public void setAgents(List<Agent> agents)
      Sets the list of agents currently on this edge.
      Parameters:
      agents - new list of agents
